title: lycopodium selago subsp. appressum
intro: Lycopodium selago subsp. appressum, also known as Stag's Horn Club Moss, is a species of club moss that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lycopodium selago subsp. appressum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile addition to traditional medicine and natural remedies.
